GovconEDU Capabilities Statement

SB Certifications

Company Profile:

GovconEDU is a leading provider of innovative Content Marketing and Communications services, specializing in amplifying brand voices and connecting organizations with their target audiences in the digital age. Established with a focus on strategic storytelling and digital innovation, our company has built a distinguished track record in government communications.

Our capabilities encompass strategic planning, brand messaging, multichannel strategy development, and integrated marketing campaigns. From website development and user experience design to social media management and content performance analytics, GovconEDU offers end-to-end solutions tailored to meet the evolving needs of our clients in both digital and traditional media landscapes.

CONTRACT Info:

UEI: PE1WCZJKC7E1  CAGE CODE: 934F8

CORE Competencies:
- Digital Content Creation
- Strategic Social Media Management
- Event and Media Management
- Graphic and multimedia design
- Print and electronic communications collateral
- Video production and distribution
- Photography and digital imaging

Corporate POC:

Over 17+ years experience supporting DoD. Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro Certified, Certified Digital Marketers.

Capability Statement GOVCONEDU LLC — Prime / Subcontract Contractor.

Subcontract Celebrity Interview Videography Rick Ross. Prime Contractor: NashYacht. Contact: Cedric Nash, cnash@ocg-inc.com. Total value: $6,000. Our team successfully executed comprehensive videography services.

Training Videos for Govcon Giants. Prime Contractor: Vocatus llc. Contact: Ray Hennessy rh@vocatusllc.com. Total value: $11,600. Contracted local production teams, ensuring seamless execution of camera setup, scene preparation, recording, and post-production editing.

Ballast Rock Annual Partners Meeting. Contact: Branden Coffie, branden@govcongiants.com. Total value: $27,440. Our team provided comprehensive video production and photography services including camera setup, scene preparation, video recording, and professional photography at a DOE sponsored event.

Govcon Giants Conference 2023. Contact: Erika Baltazar, erika@govcongiants.com. Project Value: $46,750. We contracted a marketing team to execute a comprehensive promotional strategy to maximize event visibility and engagement.

Social Media Management. Contact: Travis Mack, travis@saalexcorp.com. Total value: $72,450. Developed and implemented comprehensive social media strategies using original graphics, video content, and multimedia across Saalex social media accounts.

Govcon Giants Conference 2024. Prime Contractor: Govcon Giants Inc. Contact: Michelle Bicet, michelle@govcongiants.com. Project Value: $78,800. Comprehensive promotional strategy to maximize event visibility and engagement.

Social Media Management. Contact: Vanessa Cantave, vanessa@2lyons.com. Total value: $45,000. Comprehensive social media strategies across 2 Lyons social media accounts.

Subcontract Sweat It Out Podcast / Celebrity Interview Videography Da Baby. Prime Contractor: Media Corner. Contact: Kirsten Rancon. Project Value: $2,800. Comprehensive videography services including camera setup, scene preparation, video recording, and professional editing.
